publishedAbstract: * When Creating an ODF cluster for external IBM FlashSystem storage, selecting thick volumes formats them before use, which can take a long time, preventing the cluster from being usedd quickly. * Selecting thin volumes causes warnings/errors on the IBM Flashsystem side with storage calculations which disables the pool from being able to create new volumes.
publishedTitle: Creating thick volumes from ODF GUI to a IBM flashsystem formats them before use, delaying ODF cluster creation, while thin volumes causes warnings/errors on the IBM Flashsystem side with storage calculations
